free_text: The yields and cross sections of delayed neutron
formations at photofission of heavy elements.
The yields and cross sections of delayed-neutron
formations are determined for the fission of Th232,
U235, U238, Np237, and Pu239 by bremsstrahlung
gamma-quanta in the range of the Ei giant resonance.
The resulting data are explained by the systematics
of the complete and absolute delayed-neutron yields
and by the five-Gauss fission products mass
